10438, Issued: 11-06-20, Effective: 03-01-20, Implementation: 01- 11-21) 

The patient must be under the care of a physician or allowed practitioner who is qualified 
to sign the certification and plan of care in accordance with 42 CFR 424.22. 

A patient is expected to be under the care of the physician or allowed practitioner who 
signs the plan of care. It is expected that in most instances, the physician or allowed 
practitioner who certifies the patient’s eligibility for Medicare home
